description: Use the N/search module to create and run on-demand or saved searches, then analyze and iterate through the search results.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a new search and returns it as a search.Search object.

params.name: options
params.description: Search creation options.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The search type. Use the search.Type enum to set this value.

params.name: options.filters
params.description: Search filters.

params.name: options.columns
params.description: Search return columns.

params.name: options.title
params.description: The name for a saved search. Required to save a search.

params.name: options.id
params.description: Script ID for a saved search. Begins with customsearch.

params.name: options.isPublic
params.description: Set to true to make the search public. Default is false.

params.name: options.settings
params.description: Search settings for the search.

methods.name: create.promise
methods.description: Creates a new search asynchronously and returns it as a search.Search object.

params.name: options
params.description: Search creation options.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The search type. Use the search.Type enum to set this value.

params.name: options.filters
params.description: Search filters.

params.name: options.columns
params.description: Search return columns.

params.name: options.title
params.description: The name for a saved search.

params.name: options.id
params.description: Script ID for a saved search.

params.name: options.isPublic
params.description: Set to true to make the search public.

params.name: options.settings
params.description: Search settings.

methods.name: createColumn
methods.description: Creates a new search column as a search.Column object.

params.name: options
params.description: Column creation options.

params.name: options.name
params.description: The search return column name.

params.name: options.join
params.description: The join ID for this search return column.

params.name: options.summary
params.description: The summary type. Use the search.Summary enum.

params.name: options.formula
params.description: Formula used for the column.

params.name: options.label
params.description: The label for the search column.

params.name: options.function
params.description: Special function applied to the column.

params.name: options.sort
params.description: The sort direction. Use the search.Sort enum.

methods.name: createFilter
methods.description: Creates a new search filter as a search.Filter object.

params.name: options
params.description: Filter creation options.

params.name: options.name
params.description: The name or internal ID of the search field.

params.name: options.join
params.description: The join ID for this search filter.

params.name: options.operator
params.description: The search operator. Use the search.Operator enum.

params.name: options.values
params.description: Values to use as filter values.

params.name: options.formula
params.description: Formula used by this filter.

params.name: options.summary
params.description: The summary type. Use the search.Summary enum.

methods.name: createSetting
methods.description: Creates a new search setting and returns it as a search.Setting object.

params.name: options
params.description: Setting creation options.

params.name: options.name
params.description: The name of the search parameter.

params.name: options.value
params.description: The value of the search parameter.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Deletes an existing saved search.

params.name: options
params.description: Delete options.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID or script ID of the saved search to delete.

methods.name: delete.promise
methods.description: Deletes an existing saved search asynchronously.

params.name: options
params.description: Delete options.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID or script ID of the saved search to delete.

methods.name: duplicates
methods.description: Performs a search for duplicate records based on the account's duplicate detection configuration.

params.name: options
params.description: Duplicate search options.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The search type. Use the search.Type enum.

params.name: options.fields
params.description: The field-value pairs used to detect duplicates.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of an existing record used for duplicate detection.

methods.name: duplicates.promise
methods.description: Performs a search for duplicate records asynchronously based on the account's duplicate detection configuration.

params.name: options
params.description: Duplicate search options.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The search type.

params.name: options.fields
params.description: The field-value pairs used to detect duplicates.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of an existing record.

methods.name: global
methods.description: Performs a global search against a single keyword or multiple keywords.

params.name: options
params.description: Global search options.

params.name: options.keywords
params.description: The keywords to use for the global search.

methods.name: global.promise
methods.description: Performs a global search asynchronously against a single keyword or multiple keywords.

params.name: options
params.description: Global search options.

params.name: options.keywords
params.description: The keywords to use for the global search.

methods.name: load
methods.description: Loads an existing saved search and returns it as a search.Search object.

params.name: options
params.description: Load options.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID or script ID of the saved search to load.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The search type of the saved search to load.

methods.name: load.promise
methods.description: Loads an existing saved search asynchronously and returns it as a search.Search object.

params.name: options
params.description: Load options.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID or script ID of the saved search to load.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The search type of the saved search.

methods.name: lookupFields
methods.description: Performs a search for one or more body fields on a record. Returns select fields as objects with value and text properties.

params.name: options
params.description: Lookup options.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The search type. Use the search.Type enum.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of the record.

params.name: options.columns
params.description: The body field IDs to look up.

methods.name: lookupFields.promise
methods.description: Performs a search asynchronously for one or more body fields on a record.

params.name: options
params.description: Lookup options.

params.name: options.type
params.description: The search type.

params.name: options.id
params.description: The internal ID of the record.

params.name: options.columns
params.description: The body field IDs to look up.

enums.name: Operator
enums.description: Holds the values for search operators to use with search.Filter.

members.name: NOTGREATERTHANOREQUALTO
members.description: Not greater than or equal to

members.name: NOTLESSTHANOREQUALTO
members.description: Not less than or equal to

enums.name: Sort
enums.description: Holds the values for supported sorting directions used with search.createColumn(options).

enums.name: Summary
enums.description: Holds the values for summary types used by the Column.summary property.

enums.name: Type
enums.description: Holds the string values for search types used with search.create(options).

objectTypes.name: Search
objectTypes.description: Encapsulates a NetSuite search. Use the methods available to the Search object to create, run, or save a search.

methods.name: run
methods.description: Runs an on-demand search created with search.create() or loaded with search.load(), returning the results as a search.ResultSet.

methods.name: runPaged
methods.description: Runs the current search and returns a search.PagedData object.

params.name: options
params.description: Paging options.

params.name: options.pageSize
params.description: Maximum number of entries per page (5 to 1000). Default is 50.

methods.name: runPaged.promise
methods.description: Asynchronously runs the current search and returns a search.PagedData object.

params.name: options
params.description: Paging options.

params.name: options.pageSize
params.description: Maximum number of entries per page (5 to 1000). Default is 50.

methods.name: save
methods.description: Saves a search created by search.create() or loaded with search.load(). Returns the internal ID of the saved search.

methods.name: save.promise
methods.description: Asynchronously saves a search. Returns the internal ID of the saved search.

properties.name: searchType
properties.description: Search type on which the search is based.

properties.name: searchId
properties.description: Internal ID of the search.

properties.name: filters
properties.description: Filters for the search as an array of search.Filter objects.

properties.name: filterExpression
properties.description: Search filter expression as an array of expression objects.

properties.name: columns
properties.description: Columns to return as an array of search.Column objects or string array of column names.

properties.name: title
properties.description: Title for a saved search.

properties.name: id
properties.description: Script ID for a saved search, starting with customsearch.

properties.name: isPublic
properties.description: True if the search is public, false otherwise.

properties.name: packageId
properties.description: The application ID for the search.

properties.name: settings
properties.description: Search settings as an array of search.Setting objects or string array.

objectTypes.name: ResultSet
objectTypes.description: Encapsulates a set of search results returned by Search.run().

methods.name: each
methods.description: Iterates over each result row, up to 4000 results. Return true from callback to continue, false to stop.

params.name: callback
params.description: A developer-defined function invoked for each result. Receives a search.Result object.

methods.name: each.promise
methods.description: Asynchronously iterates over each result row, up to 4000 results.

params.name: callback
params.description: A developer-defined function invoked for each result.

methods.name: getRange
methods.description: Retrieves a slice of the search result as an array of search.Result objects.

params.name: options
params.description: Range options.

params.name: options.start
params.description: The index of the first result to return.

params.name: options.end
params.description: The index of the last result to return (exclusive).

methods.name: getRange.promise
methods.description: Asynchronously retrieves a slice of the search result as an array of search.Result objects.

params.name: options
params.description: Range options.

params.name: options.start
params.description: The index of the first result to return.

params.name: options.end
params.description: The index of the last result to return (exclusive).

properties.name: columns
properties.description: An array of search.Column objects representing the columns returned in the search results.

objectTypes.name: Result
objectTypes.description: Encapsulates a single search result row. Use the methods and properties to get column values for the result.

methods.name: getValue
methods.description: Returns the value of a specified search return column. Accepts an options object with name, join, and summary properties, or a search.Column object.

params.name: options
params.description: Column options object or a search.Column object.

params.name: options.name
params.description: The search return column name.

params.name: options.join
params.description: The join ID for the search return column.

params.name: options.summary
params.description: The summary type used for the column.

methods.name: getText
methods.description: Returns the UI display name (text value) for a search result column. Accepts an options object with name, join, and summary properties, or a search.Column object.

params.name: options
params.description: Column options object or a search.Column object.

params.name: options.name
params.description: The search return column name.

params.name: options.join
params.description: The join ID for the search return column.

params.name: options.summary
params.description: The summary type used for the column.

properties.name: id
properties.description: The internal ID for the record returned in the search result row.

properties.name: recordType
properties.description: The type of record returned in the search result row.

properties.name: columns
properties.description: Array of search.Column objects for the columns returned in the result row.

objectTypes.name: Column
objectTypes.description: Encapsulates a single search column in a search.Search object.

methods.name: setWhenOrderedBy
methods.description: Returns the search column for which the minimal or maximal value should be found when returning the Column value.

params.name: options
params.description: Options for ordering.

params.name: options.name
params.description: The name of the search column for which the minimal or maximal value should be found.

params.name: options.join
params.description: The join ID for the column.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name of the search column.

properties.name: join
properties.description: Join ID for the search column.

properties.name: summary
properties.description: Returns the summary type for the search column.

properties.name: formula
properties.description: Formula used for the search column.

properties.name: function
properties.description: Special function used in the search column.

properties.name: label
properties.description: Label used for the search column. Custom labels only.

properties.name: sort
properties.description: The sort direction for this column. Use search.Sort enum values.

properties.name: type
properties.description: The formula return type of the column.

objectTypes.name: Filter
objectTypes.description: Encapsulates a search filter used in a search.

properties.name: name
properties.description: Name or internal ID of the search field.

properties.name: join
properties.description: Join ID for the search filter.

properties.name: operator
properties.description: Operator used for the search filter.

properties.name: summary
properties.description: Summary type for the search filter.

properties.name: formula
properties.description: Formula used by the search filter.

properties.name: values
properties.description: Values for the search filter.

objectTypes.name: PagedData
objectTypes.description: Holds metadata about a paginated query.

methods.name: fetch
methods.description: Retrieves the data within the specified page range.

params.name: options
params.description: Fetch options.

params.name: options.index
params.description: The index of the page range to fetch.

methods.name: fetch.promise
methods.description: Asynchronously retrieves the data within the specified page range.

params.name: options
params.description: Fetch options.

params.name: options.index
params.description: The index of the page range to fetch.

properties.name: count
properties.description: The total number of results when Search.runPaged() was executed.

properties.name: pageRanges
properties.description: The collection of PageRange objects that divide the result set into smaller groups.

properties.name: pageSize
properties.description: The maximum number of entries per page.

properties.name: searchDefinition
properties.description: The search criteria used when Search.runPaged() was executed.

objectTypes.name: Page
objectTypes.description: Encapsulates a set of search results for a single search page.

methods.name: next
methods.description: Gets the next segment of data from a paginated search.

methods.name: next.promise
methods.description: Asynchronously gets the next segment of data from a paginated search.

methods.name: prev
methods.description: Gets the previous segment of data from a paginated search.

methods.name: prev.promise
methods.description: Asynchronously gets the previous segment of data from a paginated search.

properties.name: data
properties.description: The results from a paginated search page.

properties.name: isFirst
properties.description: Indicates whether this page is the first page of data.

properties.name: isLast
properties.description: Indicates whether this page is the last page of data.

properties.name: pagedData
properties.description: The PagedData object used to fetch this Page object.

properties.name: pageRange
properties.description: The PageRange object used to fetch this Page object.

objectTypes.name: PageRange
objectTypes.description: Defines the page range to bound the result set for a paginated query.

properties.name: compoundLabel
properties.description: Human-readable label with beginning and ending range identifiers.

properties.name: index
properties.description: The index of this page range.

objectTypes.name: Setting
objectTypes.description: Encapsulates a search setting. Search settings let you specify search parameters typically available only in the UI.

properties.name: name
properties.description: The name of the search parameter.

properties.name: value
properties.description: The value of the search parameter.
